description: Calculate the Water Surface Elevation (WSE) time series at a virtual river station located at the midpoint between the 2nd and 3rd most upstream cross-sections of the Muncie model using the HEC-RAS results in 'Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf'. Linearly interpolate the WSE time series for this location. Save the analysis script to '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/virtual_gauge_analysis.py'. Create '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/virtual_gauge_info.txt' containing the 'Upstream Station: X', 'Downstream Station: Y', and 'Target Station: Z' on separate lines. Export the interpolated results to '~/Documents/hec_ras_results/virtual_gauge_wse.csv' with columns 'Time_Index' and 'Interpolated_WSE_ft'.
